productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Boys Grey Slim Fit Jeans
description: Grey 5 pocket jeans, lightly washed detail, button and zip closure, waistband with belt loops and adjustable elasticated band on the inner, 2 scoop pockets at the front, coin pocket on the right, patch detail on the left pocket, whiskers, 2 patch pockets at the back with panel detail, stitched detail throughout
